ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. MATTER CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 16, 2021 AT 1:30 P.M. D.506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-02-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC. DBA    LOANMART AS TO DEFENDANT ESTACIO, ROSITA PALMA CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-16-2021 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2020 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-16-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WHEELS FINANICAL GROUP, LLC REPRESENTED BY GUNARATNE DINUSHI IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANT ROSITA PALMA ESTACIO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUEST A CONTINUANCE. SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR WAS NOT SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF FOR TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF IS INSTRUCTED TO FILE AN AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR AT LEAST 5 DAYS BEFORE THE NEXT TRIAL DATE. PLAINTIFF IS ALSO INSTRUCTED THAT SHE WILL NEED TO SUBMIT A REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE FOR THE NEXT TRIAL DATE. PLAINTIFF'S SUBMITTED EXHIBITS ARE KEPT WITH THE CASE FILE. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-19-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506, COURT ORDER (PF/506).
